title: End Frame Crafting
description: Craft 3 end portal frames using a Warden Core, dropped by Wardens 100% of the time.
body:
Requires Fabric API

Craft an end portal frame using a Warden Core, dropped by Wardens 100% of the time. This is then used with the following recipe, to make 3 end portal frames.

![End portal recipe, using 3 echo shards across the top, a warden core with a sculk catalyst on either side, then 3 end stone. Results in 3 end portal frames.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3d477e0ee6e84833c62e1824540d4d6042b68f7.png)

Based on: https://authors.curseforge.com/forums/bounty-board/minecraft/262157-end-portal-frame-recipe-1-19
